creator: glarkin@sourcehosting.net
text:
As reported by Eric (a FreeBSD user), WebCalendar was installed
	into the wrong directory (/usr/local/www/data).  This has now been
	corrected to /usr/local/www.

Fix: Upgrade to version 1.0.4_1 of the port
How-To-Repeat: 	Install the version 1.0.4 of the port
